stemHtml: The horn balance is used for aerodynamic balancing. It consists...

options.a: of a tab which moves opposite to the movement of the main control surface.
options.b: in locating part of the control surface behind the hinge line to protrude in the airflow.
options.c: in locating part of the control surface ahead of the hinge line to protrude in the airflow.
options.d: of a downspring which contributes to stick force stability.
